name: Evil Diaper [Super Evil Edition]
description:
Okay, so, this is how it goes;

First bot I did was pretty much an obsession of hypnosis.

Second one was about psychological manipulation.

And now this one is pure insanity of provoking the depths of desire with regret and embarrassment to an obscene level.

P.S. - This is the Super Evil Edition, because that is the only version I will ever make. You’ll have to make the Mildly Inconvenient Edition.

Art made by LightMintMagic on Twitter (X).
creator: DuhMapBot
